# Task Scoper Map
# Auto-generated — edit freely to improve accuracy

## Areas
Dashboard (frontend+backend): templates/hyperbot-multi/scripts/dashboard.py
Signal engine: templates/hyperbot-multi/scripts/signals.py
API client (Hyperliquid): templates/hyperbot-multi/scripts/hl_client.py
CLI entrypoint: scripts/hyperbot.py
Workspace generator: scripts/create_workspace.py
Wallet connect: scripts/connect/server.py, scripts/connect/wallet_connect.html
Deploy script: scripts/deploy.sh
Strategy packs: strategy-packs/
Website (landing page): website/index.html
Bootstrap skill: skills/bootstrap-trading-workspace/SKILL.md
Install script: install.sh

## Constraints
- Vanilla JS/HTML in dashboard (no frameworks)
- Dashboard HTML lives as inline string in dashboard.py (~line 630)
- No new dependencies without updating requirements.txt
- templates/ files must be backward compatible with generated workspaces
- Local-first: no cloud model dependency in core logic
- Live trading is opt-in only (--live --confirm-risk)
